title: senecio microtis
intro: Senecio microtis, also known as Narrow-leaved Fireweed, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the southeastern regions of Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio microtis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Senecio microtis can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
